items.title: Plato aces space-like tests
items.summary: The European Space Agency Plato mission has successfully completed a series of tough tests under space‑like conditions. With this accomplishment, the spacecraft is on track to lift off in early 2027 and begin its search for terrestrial planets.

The proposal came just a few days after the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) tightened its rules for new foreign-made routers.
